notes: Culprit refactors agent bootstrap and drops the step that registers predefined internal agents (e.g. thread-title-determiner) at startup. After the deploy/restart the org-scoped lookup can't find them and ai-agent-svc returns 500; ai-memory-svc's context builder fails downstream. Fix is to restore the registration (roll-forward), matching the real fallback-fix PR. The web restyle deploy near onset is an innocent decoy.
